title: The Weird Science of Oobleck
hook: This goo is liquid and solid at the same time — and you can punch it.
description: Dash explores oobleck (cornstarch + water), a non-Newtonian fluid demonstrated in science centers worldwide. Explain shear thickening: soft when poured, firm when struck. Show Dash walking/punching comedy beats. Accurate, playful, no overclaims.
